title: Instrument d'adhésion d'Israël

pages.text:
GOLDA MEIR

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS

TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME BE IT KNOWN

WHEREAS on the Twenty-Ninth day of November, One Thousand

Nine Hundred and Twenty-Four, there was done at Paris an Agreement for the Creation in Paris of an International Vine end Wine Office;

AND WHEREAS by Article 6 of the Agreement it is provided that any country not a party to the Agreement mey accede thereto;

AND WHEREAS on the Thirteenth day of September, One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Fifty-Nine, the Government of Israel, in accordance with the powers vested in it by law, decided to accede to the said Agreement;

NOW THEREFORE, by these Presents, it is declared that the

Government of Israel accedes to the Agreement for the Creation in

Paris of an International Vine and Wine Office, done at Peris on 29 November 1924.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I, Golda Meir, Minister for Foreign

Affairs, have hereunto caused the Seal of the Ministry for Foreign

Affairs to be affixed, and have subscribed my signature at Jerusalem ihis Twenty-Third day of Tishri, Five Thousand Seven Hundred and

Twenty, which corresponds to the Twenty-Fifth day of October, One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Fifty-Nine.

HLda Mer
